title: Timeline view-model (gantt off target_date + slip)
description: Add the Timeline view-model (internal/tui/view_timeline.go): gantt-style render keyed on tick.TargetDate, surfacing the derived query.Slip signal (overdue / on-track / none) per row. Pure data-to-string row renderer with an INJECTED clock (no real time) so goldens are stable. Register via ONE-LINE append in registerViews(). Blocked-by the roadmap-view tick only to serialize the registerViews() edit (merge-safety), not a real dependency. Files: internal/tui/view_timeline.go (new) + test; one-line registerViews append.
acceptance_criteria: unit: Slip classification drives row color given injected now; rows sort by target_date; teatest golden: Timeline tab with fixed clock renders overdue vs on-track distinctly
